title: Section 19
content: 1[19. Orders passed by Appellate Tribunal to be executable as a decree.-- (1) An order passed by the Appellate Tribunal under this Act shall be executable by the Appellate Tribunal as a decree of civil court, and for this purpose, the Appellate Tribunal shall have all the powers of a civil court. (2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1), the Appellate Tribunal may transmit any order made by it to a civil court having local jurisdiction and such civil court shall execute the order as if it were a decree made by that court.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 11, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 24-1-2000).
